_comment: STUB type write-ups. All 16 codes required before launch. Replace with Shaykh-approved content.

AGSC.name: The Anchored Shepherd
AGSC.identity: [STUB] Your house runs toward you, not away from you.
AGSC.strength: [STUB] You lead from conviction, not approval.
AGSC.blindSpot: [STUB] You can mistake silence for agreement from those you love.
AGSC.quranAnchor: [STUB] And We made them leaders, guiding by Our command.
AGSC.nextStep: [STUB] Ask your wife one hard question this week — and sit with the answer.

AGSP.name: The Governed Anchor
AGSP.identity: [STUB] You hold yourself together — now learn to hold your people together.
AGSP.strength: [STUB] Your self-discipline is real and rare.
AGSP.blindSpot: [STUB] You lead yourself well but have not yet fully led your home.
AGSP.quranAnchor: [STUB] Indeed, Allah loves those who act justly.
AGSP.nextStep: [STUB] Identify one area at home where your family needs your leadership — and step in.

AGPC.name: The Governed Brother
AGPC.identity: [STUB] You show up for your brothers. Now show up the same way for your home.
AGPC.strength: [STUB] You invest in the men around you.
AGPC.blindSpot: [STUB] You are more present in the brotherhood than in your own household.
AGPC.nextStep: [STUB] Bring the same intentionality you give your brothers to one conversation with your wife this week.

AGPI.name: The Governed Man
AGPI.identity: [STUB] You govern yourself with discipline. The next step is opening up.
AGPI.strength: [STUB] You are consistent where others are chaotic.
AGPI.quranAnchor: [STUB] And hold firmly to the rope of Allah all together and do not become divided.
AGPI.nextStep: [STUB] Reach out to one brother this week — not to be needed, just to connect.

ARSC.name: The Present Shepherd
ARSC.identity: [STUB] You are there for your family and your brothers. Your nafs still tests you.
ARSC.strength: [STUB] Your presence is felt — people lean on you.
ARSC.blindSpot: [STUB] Your reactive nafs undermines the leadership you are capable of.
ARSC.quranAnchor: [STUB] And be patient, for indeed Allah does not allow to be lost the reward of those who do good.
ARSC.nextStep: [STUB] Identify your biggest recurring nafs battle and name it out loud to yourself.

ARSP.name: The Builder
ARSP.identity: [STUB] You are awake to the gap. Keep moving.
ARSP.strength: [STUB] You have not given up on becoming who you are supposed to be.
ARSP.blindSpot: [STUB] Inconsistency is your main obstacle right now.
ARSP.quranAnchor: [STUB] So verily, with the hardship comes ease.
ARSP.nextStep: [STUB] Pick one habit and protect it for 30 days before adding anything else.

ARPC.name: The Connected Builder
ARPC.identity: [STUB] You have your brothers. Now build the rest.
ARPC.strength: [STUB] Brotherhood is real for you — that is not small.
ARPC.blindSpot: [STUB] You invest in others before you have invested in yourself.
ARPC.quranAnchor: [STUB] O you who believe, protect yourselves and your families from a fire.
ARPC.nextStep: [STUB] Before your next brotherhood commitment, ask: is my own house in order?

ARPI.name: The Seeker
ARPI.identity: [STUB] You are at the beginning. That is honest — and it is the right place to start.
ARPI.strength: [STUB] You are willing to look at yourself honestly.
ARPI.blindSpot: [STUB] Everything needs attention at once — pick the one thing that unlocks the others.
ARPI.quranAnchor: [STUB] Indeed, Allah will not change the condition of a people until they change what is in themselves.
ARPI.nextStep: [STUB] Lock in your five daily prayers for 21 days before anything else.

DGSC.name: The Steady Shepherd
DGSC.identity: [STUB] You show up consistently for your family and your brothers. Now anchor your identity.
DGSC.strength: [STUB] You are dependable — your people trust your presence.
DGSC.blindSpot: [STUB] You lead others without a clear internal compass.
DGSC.quranAnchor: [STUB] And upon Allah let the believers rely.
DGSC.nextStep: [STUB] Write down in one sentence what you believe you were made to do. Keep it.

DGSP.name: The Quiet Leader
DGSP.identity: [STUB] You carry your family with discipline. Your identity is still forming.
DGSP.strength: [STUB] You are a reliable provider and protector.
DGSP.blindSpot: [STUB] You have not yet answered the question of who you are beyond your role.
DGSP.quranAnchor: [STUB] Whoever fears Allah, He will make for him a way out.
DGSP.nextStep: [STUB] Spend 10 minutes alone this week asking: what does Allah want from me specifically?

DGPC.name: The Brotherhood Man
DGPC.identity: [STUB] Your circle is strong. Bring that same strength home.
DGPC.strength: [STUB] You invest in other men — that is rare.
DGPC.blindSpot: [STUB] Your home does not get what your brotherhood gets.
DGPC.quranAnchor: [STUB] And cooperate in righteousness and piety.
DGPC.nextStep: [STUB] Apply one thing from your brotherhood to your relationship with your wife this week.

DGPI.name: The Lone Carrier
DGPI.identity: [STUB] You carry your weight alone. That is strength — and also a gap.
DGPI.strength: [STUB] You are self-reliant and do not burden others.
DGPI.blindSpot: [STUB] You have cut yourself off from the men who could help you grow.
DGPI.quranAnchor: [STUB] And remind, for indeed the reminder benefits the believers.
DGPI.nextStep: [STUB] Go to Jumu'ah this week and stay after — introduce yourself to one man.

DRSC.name: The Present Man
DRSC.identity: [STUB] You are in the room for the people who matter. Now lead from the front.
DRSC.blindSpot: [STUB] Presence without direction leaves your family without a map.
DRSC.quranAnchor: [STUB] Men are the caretakers of women.
DRSC.nextStep: [STUB] Name one direction you want to take your family in the next year — and say it out loud to them.

DRSP.name: The Unfinished Man
DRSP.identity: [STUB] You are still becoming who you are supposed to be. That is not failure — that is honesty.
DRSP.blindSpot: [STUB] You are drifting in too many areas at once.
DRSP.quranAnchor: [STUB] So race to all that is good.
DRSP.nextStep: [STUB] Pick the one area of your life that — if you fixed it — would fix everything else. Start there.

DRPC.name: The Social Man
DRPC.identity: [STUB] You are surrounded by people. Now go deeper with yourself.
DRPC.strength: [STUB] You are not isolated — that matters.
DRPC.blindSpot: [STUB] Surface community is not the same as real brotherhood.
DRPC.quranAnchor: [STUB] O you who believe, fear Allah and be with the truthful.
DRPC.nextStep: [STUB] Have one real conversation this week — not small talk. Something that costs you something to say.

DRPI.name: The Drifter
DRPI.identity: [STUB] You are going through the motions. The fact that you took this means something in you wants more.
DRPI.strength: [STUB] You showed up for this. That is the first step.
DRPI.blindSpot: [STUB] You are managing life, not leading it.
DRPI.quranAnchor: [STUB] Has the time not come for those who have believed that their hearts should become humbly submissive at the remembrance of Allah?
DRPI.nextStep: [STUB] Pray Fajr on time tomorrow. Not a plan — just tomorrow. Then the day after.
